domains.name: Support Desk
domains.description: Customer support tickets, comments, and customers from the help-desk platform, exposed over a REST API. Answers questions about ticket volume by status and priority, response activity, and per-customer ticket history. The REST backend has no native aggregation, so counts and rollups are computed deterministically server-side after fetching the matching rows.
example_questions: How many open tickets do we have right now?
How many tickets per status were created this week?
Which customer has the most high-priority tickets?
